title: bouteloua tenuis var. humilis
intro: Bouteloua tenuis var. humilis, also known as blue grama, is a type of grass native to the prairies of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, heal wounds, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of blue grama include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve heart health, and support immune function. Blue grama can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate a range of health concerns.
